GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "This new Australian label will make you fall in love with wearing jewellery again, just in time for summer", "This year, as the personal style we've spent most of our adult lives perfecting was traded in for a rotation of the same three sets of sweats, a lot of the nuance and joy of that style was put on hold. For better or worse, we went back to basics. But as the season starts to turn, there's delight to be found in the art of getting dressed again: we're getting ready to inject old favourites with new life, and team them with exciting new additions for a little extra panache. What's more, the easy days of high summer are the perfect time to be more playful with your wardrobe, and the energy of the season lends itself to embracing a certain kind of freedom and fun with what you wear. Arriving just in time – and evoking that feel-good ethos – is a charming new Australian-born jewellery label, Medley. Intended to be classic enough for everyday wear, but with interesting details that help inject hints of personality (think: chakra motifs, hearts, crosses and perfectly placed diamonds), Medley's range is full of pieces you can return to over and over again. In the spirit of a carefree summer, the brand's credo is 'worn for nobody', which is exactly the approach we're taking to dressing going into the warmer months and beyond. Stack up tiny ear studs from its Dripp'd in Diamonds range (made using real diamonds and plated in 18K gold) for a perfectly honed ear-party vibe, while the super-fine Cable Knit Chain (in either gold or silver, depending on your whim) is the ultimate fuss-free staple for easy days spent under the sun. Or layer it up with a pendant, like a heart chakra, or a third eye to channel a little extra intuition. By using materials such as 925 sterling silver, solid 10-karat gold, yellow 18-karat gold plate and rose gold plate, Medley's pieces are as durable as they are stylish, while also priced in a way that means you'll be able to afford to make them your go-tos. In an applaudable move, the brand has also partnered with i=Change, so that $1 from every purchase goes straight to one of three local charities – including Foodbank, the Australian Childhood Foundation and Women's Community Shelters. Vanessa Brennan, Medley's chief brand and strategy officer, says, "At Medley, we aim to build self-confidence and enhance the individuality of every woman. With this belief at our core, i=Change is the perfect partner." With such a worthy approach to improving the lives of women and girls, wearing Medley's pieces will make you feel good in more ways than one. Jewellery that – much like a well-rounded summer – has as much substance as it does style? Count us in. Vogue's picks: Astro Locket, $179, from Medley Jewellery. Pearl Power Bracelet, $79, from Medley Jewellery. Micro Ms. Brightside Diamond Studs, $199, from Medley Jewellery. Root Chakra Pendant, $99, from Medley Jewellery."
